Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Veris Arelius]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Veris Arelius is the remaining Underlady of House Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Veris Arelius has blue eyes and yellow hair tied into a braid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Veris Arelius fights for the late Tiberian Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Veris is an Arelius woman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Veris uses lightning-based techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Veris is an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Veris Arelius is Eithan's cousin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Veris Arelius communicates via a disembodied voice.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Veris Arelius is a member of the Arelius family.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
